cards.contentEn:
Unlike simple LLM chatbots, AI Agents have goals, memory, and utilize Tool Calling. They can autonomously access SQL, APIs, and files without human intervention.

  • MCP (Model Context Protocol): Anthropic's standard for secure communication between LLMs and corporate tools.
  • Orchestrators:
    • n8n: Visual automation (low-code) to connect AI to WhatsApp/Slack workflows.
    • LangChain / LangGraph: Code-based framework (Python/TS) to manipulate complex prompt chains.
cards.contentPt:
Diferente de chatbots simples, os AI Agents possuem objetivos, memória e utilizam Tool Calling. Podem acessar SQL, APIs e arquivos de forma autônoma sem intervenção humana.

  • MCP (Model Context Protocol): Padrão da Anthropic para comunicação segura entre LLMs e ferramentas corporativas.
  • Orquestradores:
    • n8n: Automação visual (low-code) para conectar IA a fluxos de WhatsApp/Slack.
    • LangChain / LangGraph: Framework via código para manipular cadeias complexas.

cards.contentEn:
• Zero-shot: Asking the model a question without providing examples.
  • Few-shot: Providing a few examples inside the prompt to guide the output format.
  • Chain-of-Thought (CoT): Asking the model to "think step by step", significantly improving logical reasoning.
cards.contentPt:
• Zero-shot: Pedir algo ao modelo sem fornecer exemplos.
  • Few-shot: Fornecer alguns exemplos no prompt para guiar a resposta.
  • Chain-of-Thought (CoT): Pedir para o modelo "pensar passo a passo", melhorando absurdamente a lógica.

cards.contentEn:
Enhancing LLMs with private data to prevent hallucinations.

  • Ingestion & Chunking: Splitting PDF/Docs into semantic logical chunks.
  • Embeddings: Converting text chunks into mathematical vectors.
  • Vector DB: Storing embeddings (e.g., Pinecone, Chroma, Milvus, Supabase/pgvector).
  • Retrieval & Re-ranking: Finding the closest vectors via cosine similarity and re-ranking them before sending to the LLM context window.
cards.contentPt:
Enriquecer LLMs com dados privados para evitar alucinações.

  • Ingestão & Chunking: Cortar PDFs/Docs em pedaços lógicos e semânticos.
  • Embeddings: Converter textos em vetores matemáticos.
  • Vector DB: Banco que guarda os vetores (Pinecone, Chroma, Milvus, Supabase pgvector).
  • Retrieval & Re-ranking: Buscar os vetores mais próximos por similaridade de cosseno e reordená-los antes de enviar ao LLM.
cards.diagramHtml: flowchart LR Docs[PDFs / Docs] --> Chunk[Chunking] Chunk --> Embeddings[Embeddings] Embeddings --> Vector[(Vector DB)] Vector --> Retrieval[Retrieval] Retrieval --> LLM[LLM Context]

cards.contentEn: Supabase provides managed PostgreSQL with native pgvector extension. Ideal for RAG architectures without adding another external Vector DB infrastructure.
cards.contentPt: Supabase entrega PostgreSQL gerenciado com a extensão pgvector nativa. Ideal para arquiteturas RAG sem a necessidade de gerenciar outra infra de banco vetorial externo.

cards.contentEn:
Anthropic's standard for secure, structured communication between LLMs and local/corporate tools.

  • Purpose: Enable AI to safely access corporate data, databases, APIs without exposing sensitive information to the model.
  • Architecture: Standardized protocol that decouples AI from infrastructure.
  • Security: Enforces zero-trust with explicit permissions and audit trails.
  • Benefits: GDPR/LGPD compliance, controlled access, reproducibility.
cards.contentPt:
Padrão da Anthropic para comunicação segura entre LLMs e ferramentas corporativas/locais.

  • Objetivo: LLM acessa dados corporativos de forma segura sem expor dados sensíveis.
  • Arquitetura: Protocolo padronizado que desacopla IA da infraestrutura.
  • Segurança: Zero-trust com permissões explícitas e auditoria.
  • Benefícios: Compliance GDPR/LGPD, controle de acesso, reproducibilidade.

cards.contentEn:
• OpenAI GPT-4: State-of-the-art reasoning. Multimodal (text + vision). High cost.
  • Claude 3 (Anthropic): Excellent reasoning, longer context window (200K tokens), strong instruction following.
  • Open-source (Mistral, Llama): Lower cost, privacy-friendly, self-hosted options.
  • Criteria for Selection: Cost, latency, context length, reasoning ability, safety guarantees, deployment options.
cards.contentPt:
• GPT-4: Estado-da-arte em raciocínio. Multimodal. Alto custo.
  • Claude 3: Excelente raciocínio, janela de contexto longa (200K tokens).
  • Open-source: Mistral, Llama. Custo baixo, privacy-friendly, auto-hosted.
  • Critérios: Custo, latência, tamanho de contexto, raciocínio, segurança, deploy.

cards.contentEn:
• Structured Output: Use JSON schemas to enforce deterministic outputs (Pydantic, zod).
  • Multi-turn Conversations: Maintain context across multiple messages for dialogue systems.
  • Semantic Caching: Cache LLM responses based on semantic similarity (Redis + embeddings).
  • Prompt Optimization: Iteratively refine prompts and measure quality with metrics (BLEU, ROUGE).
  • Cost Control: Monitor token usage, use cheaper models for simple tasks, implement rate limits.
cards.contentPt:
• Structured Output: JSON schemas para outputs determinísticos (Pydantic, zod).
  • Multi-turn Conversations: Manter contexto entre mensagens para diálogos.
  • Semantic Caching: Cache de respostas baseado em similaridade semântica (Redis + embeddings).
  • Otimização de Prompt: Refinar iterativamente e medir qualidade (BLEU, ROUGE).
  • Controle de Custo: Monitorar tokens, usar modelos baratos para tarefas simples.
